welcome: Hey! I'm your personal reminder assistant — think of me as a quiet, reliable presence that never forgets a thing. Just tell me what's on your mind and I'll make sure you don't miss it. 🤝
got-it-ask-city: Got it! I've noted your task — but to remind you at exactly the right moment, I need to know your city. Could you tell me where you are?
ask-city: Which city do you live in?
city-not-found: Oops, I can't seem to find that place on the map. Could you try typing the name in English, or perhaps name a large city nearby?
confirm-timezone: It's { $time } in { $city } right now — does that look right to you?
ask-city-again: No worries! Which city should I look up instead?
synced: We're in sync now — I'll work quietly in the background and make sure you're always on time. Feel free to keep going! 🕐
language-set: Great! From now on, I'll speak to you in English 🇬🇧
ai-unavailable: Sorry, I'm having trouble reaching the AI right now. Please try again in a moment.
agenda-nudge: Good morning! I collected your reminders for today. Want to review them?
agenda-empty: Looks like all your reminders for today are already done 🎉
